body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-3515", "cvss": {"score": 8.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-88", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command ('Argument Injection')"}], "description": "A vulnerability in the `GitHubRepository` block of the `prefect-github` integration in Prefect version 3.6.18 allows an attacker to inject arbitrary git command-line options via the `reference` field. The `reference` field is concatenated directly into a `git clone` command string without proper sanitization, and then parsed by `shlex.split()`. This enables injection of options such as `-c`, leading to potential Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF), credential theft, or remote code execution (RCE). The vulnerability affects both the `aget_directory()` and `get_directory()` methods in `src/integrations/prefect-github/prefect_github/repository.py`. This issue does not affect the GitLab and BitBucket integrations, which use a safer list-based command construction approach.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00298, "percentile": 0.21509}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-cw25-2p92-7f75", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-30T15:12:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cw25-2p92-7f75", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-cw25-2p92-7f75"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-3515"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-24T05:16:39Z", "published_at": "2026-05-26T13:30:29Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3515", "https://huntr.com/bounties/f3b048b8-7f4e-45ef-a5a7-cb841c39acde", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-cw25-2p92-7f75"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/PrefectHQ/prefect", "summary": "Prefect has an Argument Injection issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T15:12:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-cw25-2p92-7f75", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "prefect"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.6.18"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Prefect has an Argument Injection issue
